message:
✨ Add GA4 error monitor workflow — auto-creates issues from error spikes (#2570)

Runs hourly, queries GA4 for ksc_error events in the last 2 hours.
When a category+page combination exceeds the threshold (5 errors),
creates a GitHub issue with:
- Error category description and fix guidance
- triage/accepted + ai-fix-requested labels for Copilot auto-assignment
- Deduplication against existing open/recently-closed ga4-error issues

Secrets: GA4_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY, GA4_PROPERTY_ID (both set).
Uses CONSOLE_AUTO PAT for issue creation (same as auto-qa).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
